operations.name: create_client
operations.doc: Create and configure a local MLS client from JSON-serialized CreateClientParams.

operations.name: restore_client
operations.doc: Restore previously exported client state bytes.

operations.name: export_client_state
operations.doc: Export client state as opaque bytes for persistence.

operations.name: create_key_packages
operations.doc: Generate key packages and return JSON KeyPackageBundle.

operations.name: mark_key_packages_uploaded
operations.doc: Mark generated key packages as uploaded using JSON KeyPackageBundle.

operations.name: create_group
operations.doc: Create a group from JSON GroupId and return JSON GroupState.

operations.name: list_groups
operations.doc: Return JSON array of GroupState objects.

operations.name: get_group_state
operations.doc: Return JSON GroupState for provided JSON GroupId.

operations.name: list_members
operations.doc: Return JSON array of group members for JSON GroupId.

operations.name: invite
operations.doc: Invite a member using JSON InviteRequest and return JSON InviteResult.

operations.name: join_from_welcome
operations.doc: Join from raw welcome message bytes and return JSON GroupState.

operations.name: remove
operations.doc: Remove a member using JSON RemoveRequest and return JSON RemoveResult.

operations.name: self_update
operations.doc: Run self-update for JSON GroupId and return JSON SelfUpdateResult.

operations.name: encrypt_message
operations.doc: Encrypt application message from JSON request and return JSON-encoded ciphertext bytes.

operations.name: handle_incoming
operations.doc: Handle incoming message JSON and return JSON Event.

operations.name: has_pending_commit
operations.doc: Return JSON boolean pending-commit state for JSON GroupId.

operations.name: clear_pending_commit
operations.doc: Clear pending commit for JSON GroupId.

operations.name: drop_group
operations.doc: Drop local group state for JSON GroupId.
